raw_jd: Job Summary:A Technical Product Consultant is responsible for understanding client requirements, providing product demonstrations, supporting implementation, and helping customers use the product effectively through technical and functional guidance.Key Responsibilities:Understand customer business requirements and recommend suitable product solutionsConduct product demonstrations, presentations, and client meetingsAssist in product implementation, onboarding, and configurationProvide technical support and troubleshoot customer issuesCollaborate with internal teams such as Product, Development, and SalesGather customer feedback and suggest product improvementsPrepare documentation, reports, and training materialsEnsure smooth customer adoption and satisfactionRequired Skills:Good communication and presentation skillsBasic technical knowledge (SQL, APIs, databases, software concepts)Problem-solving and analytical thinkingCustomer handling and relationship managementKnowledge of product lifecycle and implementation processAbility to learn new technologies quicklyPreferred Qualifications:Bachelors degree in Engineering, Computer Science, IT, or related fieldInternship or experience in Product Support / Consulting / Technical roles (preferred)Work Nature:Client interactionProduct implementationTechnical supportTraining and consultationThis role combines technical understanding + customer communication + product knowledge.Salary: 56 LPA(based on skills, experience, and interview p

gemini_verdict.experience_reason: The JD does not explicitly define a minimum experience requirement, making it potentially open to freshers.
gemini_verdict.profile_reason: The candidate has the required technical foundation (SQL, APIs) but lacks the explicitly preferred experience in product support or client-facing consulting roles.
gemini_verdict.title: Technical Product Consultant
gemini_verdict.summary: The Technical Product Consultant role involves acting as a bridge between technical product capabilities and customer business needs. Responsibilities include conducting demonstrations, assisting in implementations, and providing ongoing technical support to ensure client satisfaction.
gemini_verdict.match_reason: The candidate has the required technical foundation (SQL, APIs) but lacks the explicitly preferred experience in product support or client-facing consulting roles.
